parentAction.task: Assemble the observed mod-50 profile closure and choose the next universal square-witness domain-cover theorem or residual counterfamily before any 40501+ rollout.

sourcePackets.role: names the missing universal square-witness domain cover
decomposes the 74 observed finite witness instances
closes the selected 432/4489 top-only subprobe as a finite profile split
batch-classifies the five remaining observed top-only groups
identifies the tracked-activation cover gap for non-first-target rows
refutes the current broad tracked-activation cover at finite observed scope
terminally splits the observed same-lane 232 event
terminally splits all observed 382/832 companion gaps

contrastOnly.reason: The current observed top-only profile closure does not by itself prove contrast-only coverage or final top/contrast recombination.

frontierMeasureEffect.interpretation: This packet recombines already-emitted terminal profiles into a closure surface; it does not create another terminal leaf by itself.

routeDecision.reason: All observed top-only/non-first-target mod-50 profile gaps now have finite closure or terminal-profile accounting, but the repo still has only the 74-instance observed witness domain and the earlier blocker still lacks a quantifier over all future or unenumerated representatives n and square witness moduli Q.

residualBoundary.statement: Classify or finitely cover every relevant pair (n, Q), where n is a future/family representative and Q is a square witness modulus that can obstruct a continuation in c = 32 + 50*m.
outsideScope: Any future or unenumerated representative n not in the observed finite witness census.
Any square witness modulus Q not covered by a parametric domain theorem.
Any observed-period family not proved to belong to a covered handoff or contrast-only recombination theorem.
The post-40500 sufficiency theorem or any theorem-facing finite regression interval.

remainingObligations.statement: Prove a parametric cover for all relevant (n,Q,bad-lane) families in c = 32 + 50*m, or emit a residual counterfamily/hypotheses packet with an exact denominator and representative family.
Recombine the 11 observed contrast-only groups and any parametric contrast-only families with the top repair-class handoff.
Prove why the compact 1..40500 base plus symbolic lane theorem suffices beyond 40500, or name a theorem-facing finite regression interval.

proofBoundary: This packet assembles the observed mod-50 top-only profile closure from existing finite packets. It does not prove the universal square-witness domain cover, does not close contrast-only recombination, does not justify a 40501+ rollout, and does not decide Problem 848.
nextTheoremMove: Derive the universal square-witness domain cover for c = 32 + 50*m from the symbolic bad-lane schema and restored family-menu structure, or emit an exact residual counterfamily/hypotheses packet before any 40501+ rollout.
suggestedVerificationCommand: jq '{observedWitnessDomain, assembledClosure, routeDecision, residualBoundary, remainingObligations, claims}' packs/number-theory/problems/848/SPLIT_ATOM_PACKETS/FRONTIER_BRIDGE/P848_MOD50_OBSERVED_PROFILE_CLOSURE_PACKET.json
